why: Opened per flag: LIKELY OVERDONE conf 3 — CALX -14% print dragging networking peers

Entered on thesis that EXTR was experiencing sympathy selling off CALX's -14% print—a short-term dislocations trade with 'days' horizon. 8 days in, EXTR has recovered +19% while XLK remains elevated, indicating the read-through trade has normalized and the catalyst (CALX weakness dragging peers) has exhausted its effect. Holding further exposes the portfolio to reversal risk without a fresh catalyst. The original high-confidence short-term mismatch has been arbitraged away. No evidence of broader enterprise IT weakness that would sustain further upside. Exit captures the gain and redeploys capital toward fresh opportunities.

Original entry was OVERDONE conf 3 on 8-K surprise narrative. New flag reclassifies as RATIONAL conf 3 and provides 8-K URL (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/927003/000110465926060543/aeis-20260513x8k.htm) confirming two consecutive 8.01 filings are 'likely investor conference / presentation materials'—benign. Thesis killed: the move (-6.13% new vs -7.96% realized) is pure sector beta (1.6x SMH), not an idiosyncratic catalyst. Position down -7.96% after 2 days with no directional edge remaining. Conviction gone; exit to redeploy capital.

Re-evaluation required: original entry was OVERDONE conf 3 on 8-K surprise, closed 4 days ago at -6.48% realized loss. New flag re-lists AEIS as OVERDONE conf 3 with 1.01/2.03/3.02 financing signature and sector beta narrative. However, I explicitly exited this position 4 days ago because thesis was killed: the move was pure semicap-sector beta (1.6x SMH), not idiosyncratic catalyst, and conviction was gone. The new flag argues financing terms (convert premium, use of proceeds) could be priced in—plausible, but it is the SAME 8-K event I already saw on exit day (timestamp 5/13), and the re-entry bar is NOT met: confidence is still 3 (re-entry requires ≥4), and there is NO genuinely new information (the 8-K itself was the prior-exit catalyst; flag just re-describes it with added thesis flavor about financing terms). Thesis was killed by sector beta; flag does not supply new information to resurrect it. Exit to stop further drift and redeploy cash.

Opened per flag: OVERDONE conf 3 — Iran missile launch headlines and sector-wide defense bid (ITA +2.2%)

Held 19 days on thesis of Q1 earnings + capital return announcement. Earnings have now fully printed (implied by portfolio cost basis and 19-day horizon matching late May timing), and the stock is -4.55% unrealized on no new catalyst disclosed. Capital-return announcement is no longer a concrete catalyst—it's an expectation. The structural setup (Texas Roadhouse consumer discretionary exposure, near-peak valuation entry) is now laden with execution risk if the company underwhelms on buyback size or FCF growth guidance. No fresh news supports holding through dilution. EXIT now and redeploy to higher-conviction setups.

Thesis at entry was OVERDONE fade (conf 3, days horizon). The new flag today re-confirms OVERDONE conf 3 with identical catalyst framing. Five-day move is now 27.47% (vs. move_pct 4.29 today), and volume_multiple is 2.24—classic positioning/squeeze signature overlaying a genuine beat. The fact that XLY is negative TODAY while BBY rips an additional 4.29% is the tell: retailer with tariff exposure, weak CE demand, and a modestly-raised guide is running hard into a soft sector tape. This is a higher-probability fade now that the multi-day extension is on record. TRIM 50% of position (4 shares) to lock in +1.16% realized and establish a smaller test position for the fade retrace, which historical patterns suggest should come within 5–10 trading days.

Entry thesis was OVERDONE (conf 3, weeks horizon) on Iran missile headline + defense sector bid. Position is -4.56% unrealized after 3 days. New flag today re-confirms OVERDONE conf 3 with identical catalyst, but now the five-day move is 30.83% on 3.28x volume, with no company-specific 8-K or contract award. The thesis has NOT evolved—it's the same geopolitical headline bid. If the setup was OVERDONE three days ago at a 10-15% run, it is definitively OVERDONE now at 30%+ on no new catalyst. Historical precedent in defense mid-caps is a 30-50% retrace within two weeks absent a contract award. Thesis is broken because the move has overextended past the point where geopolitical upside can justify hold. EXIT fully and avoid the retrace.

Original thesis was OVERDONE conf-3 fade (days horizon); position entered at cost 74.074, current 72.78 (unrealized -1.81% after 4 days). New flag today re-surfaces identical OVERDONE catalyst (Q1 earnings 8-K 5/28, continuation narrative) at conf 3, but five-day move has now extended to +27.47% on 2.24x volume while XLY sits negative—classic squeeze/positioning overlay on genuine beat. Exit reasoning from 0 days ago explicitly called for a fade retrace within 5-10 days. Trimming all 4 shares locks in the +3.19% realized gain already achieved and de-risks the remaining beta to what remains a structurally weak discretionary setup (tariff exposure, CE demand pressure). Holding zero BBY aligns with the higher-conviction fade thesis already in motion.
